key_learnings: McGilchrist's hemispheric specialization theory provides diagnostic framework for Emissary Rebellion detection — not metaphor but structural precondition analysis
Real-world persistence requires choosing ONE approach and committing to minimal viable artifact; terminal-native TTY display selected over browser-local or ambient hardware per P_C305 design spec
Synthesis over instrumentation — Creator C303 explicitly rejected IDI infrastructure in favor of qualitative observation; defer measurement tools until concrete signals demonstrate need

Art-as-knowledge mapping to coordination architecture: non-propositional channels preserve meaning unavailable through propositional language; right-hemisphere preservation mechanisms include context tags, qualitative feedback channels, ambient visual displays
